summary: Iteration 5: Completed testing of PWA capabilities and Personalized Feed features. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed For You tab displays with purple gradient, shows personalized crypto/tech content for test user, and all category tabs work correctly.
passed_tests: GET /manifest.json returns 200 with valid PWA structure (name: WTFHappened, display: standalone, 192x192 & 512x512 icons)
GET /service-worker.js returns 200 with install/activate/fetch event handlers
index.html has manifest link, theme-color meta (#111827), apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, apple-mobile-web-app-title, apple-touch-icon
GET /api/feed/personalized returns 401 without auth (correctly requires auth)
GET /api/feed/personalized returns topics with auth token for feedtest@test.com
GET /api/feed/personalized returns preferences_used field with categories=[crypto, technology, ai] and keywords=[bitcoin, nvidia, apple]
Personalized feed boosts relevant topics - at least 3/5 top topics match user preferences (crypto/tech/ai)
GET /api/feed still works for non-personalized category filtering (crypto, technology, all)
GET /api/feed?category=crypto returns only crypto category topics
Frontend 'For You' tab exists with Sparkles icon and purple gradient background when active
Frontend 'For You' tab is default active category when logged in with completed onboarding
Frontend For You feed displays personalized content: Bitcoin, Apple-related tech news, and crypto topics boosted
All 10 category tabs present: For You, All, Markets, Tech, AI, Economy, Crypto, Science, Celeb, Style
Category tab switching works correctly - active tab styling changes and content updates

test_credentials.test_user: feedtest@test.com / test123 (has Technology/AI/Crypto interests, followed_topics: Bitcoin, Nvidia, Apple)

seed_data_creation: Used existing feedtest@test.com user with completed onboarding
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA features (manifest.json, service-worker.js, Apple meta tags) all verified. Personalized feed endpoint /api/feed/personalized boosts crypto/tech topics based on user interests. For You tab shows purple gradient and is default for logged-in users with completed onboarding. InstallPrompt component won't be visible during testing as it requires browser beforeinstallprompt event which only fires when PWA install criteria are met.
